Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • compartment_id - (Required) (Updatable) The OCID of the compartment that contains the Visual Builder instance.
  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) A user-friendly name for the Visual Builder instance.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • idcs_open_id - (Optional) (Updatable) The encrypted IDCS Open ID token used by the Visual Builder instance.
  • is_visual_builder_enabled - (Optional) (Updatable) Enables Visual Builder for the instance.
  • node_count - (Optional) (Updatable) The number of nodes for the Visual Builder instance.
  • custom_endpoint - (Optional) (Updatable) Custom endpoint configuration.
    • hostname - (Required) (Updatable) The custom hostname to use for the Visual Builder instance URL.
    • certificate_secret_id - (Optional) (Updatable) The certificate secret OCID for the custom hostname.
  • alternate_custom_endpoints - (Optional) (Updatable) Alternate custom endpoints for the Visual Builder instance URL.
    • hostname - (Required) (Updatable) The alternate custom hostname.
    • certificate_secret_id - (Optional) (Updatable) The certificate secret OCID for the alternate custom hostname.
  • network_endpoint_details - (Optional) (Updatable) Public or private endpoint configuration for the Visual Builder instance.
    • network_endpoint_type - (Required) (Updatable) The network endpoint type for the Visual Builder instance.
    • subnet_id - (Optional) (Updatable) The subnet OCID for a private endpoint.
    • network_security_group_ids - (Optional) (Updatable) Network security groups for a private endpoint.
    • allowlisted_http_ips - (Optional) (Updatable) Allowlisted ingress CIDRs for a public endpoint.
    • allowlisted_http_vcns - (Optional) (Updatable) Allowlisted VCNs for a public endpoint.
      • id - (Required) (Updatable) The VCN OCID.
      • allowlisted_ip_cidrs - (Optional) (Updatable) Allowlisted CIDRs for the VCN.
